message:
fix(btree,vdbe): simplify learned index pre-segment lookup and fix pseudo cursor RowData

Learned index (learned_index.rs):
- When a key falls before the first segment (idx==0), always return None
  instead of checking against the first segment's key_hi. A key before
  the first segment boundary cannot belong to any segment.

VDBE engine (engine.rs):
- Add pseudo_reg field to MemCursor to track the source register for
  pseudo-table data, passed from OpenPseudo's p2 operand
- Fix RowData for pseudo cursors to copy the blob from the source register
  into the target register, instead of leaving the target unchanged
- Clear pending_next_after_delete state on Prev opcode before evaluating
  cursor movement, preventing stale delete state from corrupting backward
  traversal
- Fix pseudo cursor column extraction to use the tracked source register

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
